step_rationale: Tight-junction scaffolding protein; intestinal barrier loss promotes systemic endotoxemia and vascular inflammation.
mechanism: ZO-1 degradation compromises intestinal-epithelial tight junctions, allowing pathogen-associated molecular pattern translocation and MI-risk systemic inflammation.

references.title: The gut microbiotas with metabolites regulate the protective role of miR-30a-5p in myocardial infarction.
